diyGarage.title: Prefer to Work on Your Bike Yourself?
diyGarage.text:
If you prefer, you can also use our fully equipped DIY motorcycle garage in Bali:

- Lift rental
- Professional tools
- Mechanic assistance if needed

shopPreview.title: Parts & Consumables
shopPreview.subtitle: Everything your motorcycle needs, always in stock. We use only premium fluids and genuine spare parts.

questions.q: Do you repair motorcycles in Bali?
questions.a: Yes, we provide professional motorcycle repair and maintenance services in Bali. Our expert mechanics are experienced with a wide range of motorcycles and scooters.

questions.q: Can you service Honda PCX or Yamaha NMAX?
questions.a: Absolutely. We specialize in scooter repair in Bali, including popular models like Honda PCX, Yamaha NMAX, and ADV.

questions.q: How much does motorcycle service cost?
questions.a: Our pricing is transparent. Basic services like an oil change start at very affordable rates, and we offer comprehensive service packages. See our pricing page for details.

questions.q: Do I need to book in advance?
questions.a: While we recommend booking for major repairs, we also offer fast service while you wait for minor issues. No appointment is strictly needed for quick fixes.
Yes! We offer dedicated motorcycle repair for tourists in Bali with English-speaking staff to ensure smooth communication and fast turnarounds.

questions.q: Do you also offer DIY garage?
questions.a: Yes. While we focus on professional repair, if you prefer to work on your bike yourself, you can rent our fully equipped DIY garage space by the hour.

about.title: About DIY MotoGarage
about.lead: Born from a passion for mechanics and the freedom of the ride, DIY MotoGarage is a full-service professional motorcycle workshop in Bali, offering both expert repairs and a community workspace.

mission.title: Professional Care & Community Spirit
mission.p1: Our primary focus is providing top-tier maintenance and repair services for all types of motorcycles—from daily commuter scooters to high-performance sport bikes.
mission.p2: But our roots run deep in the riding community. That's why we uniquely offer fully-equipped DIY bays for riders who prefer the satisfaction of turning their own wrenches alongside our expert mechanics.

equipment.title: Master Mechanics
equipment.description: Highly trained professionals specializing in engine rebuilds, diagnostics, and routine maintenance.

community.title: Pro Infrastructure
community.description: Equipped with hydraulic lifts, specialty scanners, air compressors, and high-quality master tools.

list.title: Bali Bike Knowledge Base
list.subtitle: Everything about maintenance, parts, and repairs for popular models.

detail.diagnosisSubtitle: Quick steps for common problems. Follow in order — this will help quickly identify the cause.
detail.noIssuesInfo: Common issues information is being updated.

yamaha-nmax.description: Popular maxi-scooter, perfectly suited for Bali roads. Comfort, power, and reliability in city conditions and on long trips.

no_start.title: Doesn't start?
no_start.info: If it didn't help: most likely a battery, spark plug, or starter problem.

cvt.title: CVT
cvt.symptoms: noise on acceleration, jerking, loss of smoothness
cvt.action: replace rollers, check and clean the belt

electronics.title: Sensors / Electronics
electronics.symptoms: errors on the panel, unstable operation

why_jerks.q: Why does it jerk on acceleration?
why_jerks.a: Most often the cause is in the CVT (rollers or belt wear).

why_no_start.a: Reasons: discharged battery, spark plug, or starter.

why_noise.a: Noise usually occurs due to the CVT or final drive.

why_vibrates.a: Reason: CVT rollers wear or wrong belt.

oil_interval.a: We recommend every 2,000 – 3,000 km or every 2 months.

fuel_type.a: Use fuel with an octane rating of at least 92 (Pertamax).

honda-pcx-160.description: Elegant and powerful scooter. Known for its smooth ride, premium design, and high fuel efficiency.

no_start.title: Won't Start?
no_start.info: Common cause is a dead keyless remote battery or discharged bike battery.

vibration_start.title: Vibration on Start?
vibration_start.info: CVT cleaning is recommended to resolve the 'gredek' vibration.

belt_noise.title: Belt Noise?
belt_noise.info: Belt might wear prematurely under heavy use.

why_vibrates.q: Why does it vibrate on start?
why_vibrates.a: This is a common 'gredek' issue, solved by CVT cleaning.

oil_type.a: We recommend Motul Scooter Expert 10W30 or 10W40.

keyless_issues.q: What to do if key not detected?
keyless_issues.a: First, replace the battery in your remote.

honda-adv-160.description: Adventure-style scooter. Robust suspension, high ground clearance, and aggressive design for all Bali roads.

no_start.title: Won't Start?
no_start.info: Check if battery terminals are loose from vibration.

abs_warning.title: ABS light on?
abs_warning.info: Dirt on sensors is a common cause for false warnings.

suspension_noise.title: Suspension knock?
suspension_noise.info: Suspension needs frequent checks when riding off-road.

offroad_capability.a: Yes, ADV is great for light off-road and mountain hairpins.

abs_behavior.q: How does ABS work on gravel?
abs_behavior.a: ABS helps prevent lockup, but braking distance may increase on loose ground.

storage_space.a: Yes, most full-face helmets fit under the seat.

yamaha-xmax.description: Powerful 250cc maxi-scooter. Superior highway stability, huge storage, and modern safety systems.

no_start.title: Won't Start?
no_start.info: XMAX is sensitive to battery charge. If below 12V — it might not start.

tcs_error.title: TCS Error?
tcs_error.info: Different tire pressure can trigger the traction control system error.

coolant_leak.title: Coolant Leak?
coolant_leak.info: Watch the temperature gauge, overheating is dangerous.

fuel_consumption.a: Average 3-3.5 liters per 100 km, depending on riding style.

maintenance_cost.a: More expensive than standard scooters due to oil volume and 250cc part costs.

handling_in_traffic.a: Size needs getting used to, but maneuverability is great for its class.

yamaha-r15.description: Racing DNA in 150cc class. Aggressive look, USD forks, and VVA engine for speed lovers.

hard_start.title: Hard to Start?
hard_start.info: High-rev engines are sensitive to spark plug condition.

clutch_slipping.title: Clutch Slipping?
clutch_slipping.info: Aggressive starts wear out clutch plates quickly.

overheating.title: Overheating?
overheating.info: In Bali traffic, it's vital to monitor the cooling system.

vva_activation.a: VVA activates at 7,400 RPM, giving a boost.

riding_position.q: Is it comfortable for long rides?
riding_position.a: Sporty position, hands and back will tire in long trips.

yamaha-mt-15.description: Naked version of R15. Same bold engine but with a comfortable upright posture for the city.

chain_noise.title: Chain Noise?
chain_noise.info: Factory chain can be noisy if not maintained.

clutch_slipping.title: Clutch Slipping?
clutch_slipping.info: Aggressive riding wears out clutch plates.

riding_position.a: No, it's very upright and comfortable for the city.

yamaha-r25.description: Twin-cylinder sport bike. The golden middle between speed and reliability.

water_pump_leak.title: Coolant Leak?
water_pump_leak.info: A known weak spot on early models.

yamaha-mt-25.description: Powerful naked for the city. Hurricane dynamics in a compact body.

overheating.title: Overheating?
overheating.info: Naked bikes run hotter in slow traffic.

honda-cb150x.description: Small adventure tourer. The best choice for exploring remote corners of Bali.

chain_slack.title: Chain Slack?
chain_slack.info: Long suspension travel requires proper chain slack.

seat_height.a: Seat height is 817mm, accessible for most riders.

honda-cb150r.description: Modern neo-classic. Style and technology in one bottle.

electrical_issue.title: Electrical Issue?
electrical_issue.info: LED lights are sensitive to voltage drops.

fuel_consumption.a: Very economical, around 2-2.5 liters per 100 km.

honda-cbr150r.description: Honda's sporty character. Reliable and predictable bike for beginners.

riding_position.a: Sporty but relatively relaxed compared to true supersports.

honda-cbr250rr.description: Technological masterpiece. Riding modes, ride-by-wire, and best-in-class handling.

throttle_error.title: Throttle Error?
throttle_error.info: Ride-by-wire system can sometimes throw codes.

no_start.title: Won't Start?
no_start.info: High electronics load requires a strong battery.

riding_modes_diff.a: Yes, Sport+ significantly changes throttle response.

honda-crf150l.description: Off-road king. Light, torquey, and practically indestructible on dirt.

clutch_slipping.title: Clutch Slipping?
clutch_slipping.info: Common from heavy clutch use offroad.

hard_start.title: Hard to Start?
hard_start.info: Dirt in the air filter or fuel.

honda-crf250l.description: Serious enduro. More power, more capabilities, more adventures.

weight.a: Around 145kg, heavier than pure dirt bikes.

kawasaki-ninja-250.description: A legend among twin-cylinder sports. Kawasaki speed and style.

riding_position.a: It's relatively relaxed for a sport bike, good for touring.

kawasaki-zx-25rr.description: 4 cylinders and 17,000 RPM. The sound and power of a real superbike in 250cc.

fuel_consumption.a: Yes, comparable to a 600cc bike (6+ liters per 100 km).

maintenance_cost.a: Yes, it's a premium high-performance machine requiring expensive parts.

suzuki-v-strom-250.description: Universal soldier. Tourer comfort and city bike maneuverability.

chain_noise.title: Chain Noise?
chain_noise.info: Keep it lubricated for long life.

top_heavy.title: Top Heavy Feel
top_heavy.symptoms: hard to balance at low speed

seat_height.a: Yes, 835mm, might be challenging for shorter riders.

offroad_capability.a: It's a soft-roader, good for gravel and light trails, not hard enduro.

bikes.diagnostics_subtitle: Quick troubleshooting steps for common issues
bikes.data_updating: Technical diagnostics for this model are being updated...
